name: Server Millisecond Clock Sync
scope: Improve live online stopwatch synchronization with a Supabase RPC returning server time in milliseconds
changes: Changed online deterministic clock to estimate server offset using t0/t1 midpoint
publishStart now syncs server clock before writing startedAtMs
HTTP Date header remains as fallback only
manual_notes: Run SUPABASE_SCHEMA_v2_6_9.sql in Supabase before expecting millisecond server sync to work
If the RPC is missing, the app falls back to HTTP Date header/server offset behavior
